summary: Actions @v4/@v2 not SHA-pinned (lines 27, 30); workflow missing required test infrastructure (no act-result.txt creation, fixture iteration, exact output validation). secrets-config.json fixture missing—workflow won't run. formatter.ts lines 40-62: three if-blocks with repeated table header/divider pattern could factor to helper. TypeScript code is well-structured but deliverable fails core workflow requirements.
